title: She Wanted Freedom, I Wanted Forever
summary: Chapter 28 of The Boy Who Never Stopped Trying is titled She Wanted Freedom, I Wanted Forever. Theme: Neither desire is wrong, but they cannot live together.
sceneDescription: Freedom and forever become diverging roads: neither wrong, but no longer the same direction.
